name: Apple Mail MCP
description: Natural language interface for Apple Mail - 29 email management tools including advanced search, intelligent workflows, bulk operations, IMAP sorting, statistics, export, and draft management

user_preferences.title: Email Preferences
user_preferences.description: Your personal email preferences that will be provided to the AI assistant when using email tools (e.g., 'Default to BCG account, show max 50 emails, prefer Archive folder')

tools.name: get_inbox_overview
tools.description: Get a comprehensive overview of your email inbox status across all accounts. Shows unread counts, mailbox structure, recent emails preview, and suggested actions.

tools.name: list_inbox_emails
tools.description: List all emails from inbox across all accounts or a specific account. Filter by account name, limit number of emails, and filter read/unread status.

tools.name: get_unread_count
tools.description: Get the count of unread emails for each account. Quick overview of unread emails across all Mail accounts.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all available Mail accounts configured in Apple Mail.

tools.name: get_recent_emails
tools.description: Get the most recent emails from a specific account. Optional content preview with configurable count.

tools.name: list_mailboxes
tools.description: List all mailboxes (folders) for a specific account or all accounts. Shows folder structure with optional message counts (total and unread).

tools.name: inbox_dashboard
tools.description: Get a structured dashboard view of your email inbox with per-account metrics, unread counts, and recent email summaries.

tools.name: get_email_with_content
tools.description: Search for emails by subject keyword and return with full content preview. Search within specific account with configurable content length.

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Unified search tool - search emails with advanced filtering by subject, sender, date range, attachment presence, and read status. Can search within specific mailbox or across all mailboxes.

tools.name: search_by_sender
tools.description: Find all emails from a specific sender across one or all accounts. Returns matching emails with metadata.

tools.name: search_email_content
tools.description: Search email body content (and optionally subject) for a search term. Full-text search across messages.

tools.name: get_newsletters
tools.description: Find newsletter and digest emails by detecting common patterns. Identifies subscription sources and frequency.

tools.name: get_recent_from_sender
tools.description: Get recent emails from a specific sender with simple, human-friendly time filters (today, this week, etc.).

tools.name: get_email_thread
tools.description: Get an email conversation thread - all messages with the same or similar subject. Strips Re:/Fwd: prefixes to group related messages.

tools.name: search_all_accounts
tools.description: Search across ALL email accounts at once by subject keyword. Cross-account search for finding emails anywhere.

tools.name: compose_email
tools.description: Compose and send a new email from a specific account. Supports TO, CC, and BCC recipients with custom subject and body.

tools.name: reply_to_email
tools.description: Reply to an email matching a subject keyword. Send reply with custom body and option to reply to all recipients.

tools.name: forward_email
tools.description: Forward an email to one or more recipients. Optionally prepend a custom message to the forwarded content. Search within specific mailbox.

tools.name: manage_drafts
tools.description: Manage draft emails with four actions: list (show all drafts), create (save new draft), send (send existing draft by subject), and delete (remove draft by subject). Supports full email composition parameters.

tools.name: move_email
tools.description: Move email(s) matching a subject keyword from one mailbox to another. Supports nested mailboxes with path notation (e.g., 'Projects/ClientName'). Includes safety limit on number of moves (default: 1).

tools.name: bulk_move_emails
tools.description: Move all emails (or emails matching a sender) from one mailbox to another. Higher limits than move_email for batch operations like inbox triage and folder merging.

tools.name: update_email_status
tools.description: Update email status in batch - mark as read/unread, flag/unflag messages. Search by subject keyword or sender within a specific mailbox. Safety limit default: 10.

tools.name: save_email_attachment
tools.description: Save a specific attachment from an email to disk. Search by subject keyword and attachment name with configurable save path.

tools.name: manage_trash
tools.description: Manage trash operations with three actions: move_to_trash (soft delete), delete_permanent (immediate deletion), and empty_trash (clear trash mailbox). Safety limit default: 5.

tools.name: sort_inbox
tools.description: Sort inbox emails into folders by sender using IMAP. Fast rule-based sorting for Proton Bridge or other IMAP-accessible accounts.

tools.name: imap_bulk_move
tools.description: Move emails between IMAP folders directly. Fast bulk move for Proton Bridge - useful for folder merging and inbox triage.

tools.name: list_email_attachments
tools.description: List attachments for emails matching a subject keyword. Shows attachment names and sizes.

tools.name: get_statistics
tools.description: Get comprehensive email statistics and analytics with three scopes: account_overview, sender_stats, and mailbox_breakdown. Configurable time range.

tools.name: export_emails
tools.description: Export emails to txt or html files. Two scopes: single_email (export one email by subject keyword) or entire_mailbox (export all emails from a mailbox to a directory).
